He competes in a noodle eating challenge against two internet celebrities, who have acquired a cult following for their ability to consume vast amounts of food. He also pays a visit to a sumo wrestling stable, where he bakes flatbreads for the fighters and sits down to dinner with the largest fighter in the history of the sport. He then takes a trip into the countryside to visit a farm for very expensive strawberries, and concludes the trip with Osaka's eat-till-you-drop food tour.(n)

programme.title: A Very British Hotel Chain: Inside Best Western
programme.desc: Documentary on the hotel company, which has 265 outlets across the United Kingdom, following its staff as they try to make a profit in the face of tough competition. In the first episode, recently-hired CEO Rob Paterson talks about rejuvenating the brand, tasking his team at the company headquarters in York with doubling their membership to 500 hotels in just two years. Meanwhile, hotel inspector Alasdair travels to the Lake District to assess if a newly-signed hotel is up to brand standards. Narrated by Diane Morgan.(n)

programme.title: The Country that Beat the Virus: What Can Britain Learn?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the way South Korea has dealt with the coronavirus outbreak, revealing a story of careful planning, mass testing and contact tracing on an astonishing scale which allowed South Korea to avoid a UK-style lockdown and economic devastation. With countries across the world failing to control the spread, the programme questions if South Korea will be able to hold off a second wave of infection, and what the UK can learn from the strategy South Korea adopted.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs

Mark was paralysed from the waist down following a motorcycle accident and the home he currently lives in with his family makes it virtually impossible for him to complete even the simplest of tasks around the house. He and his wife Penny want to build a cutting-edge family home, with a drive-in basement, passenger lift and accessible kitchen and bathroom. However, building such a unique property proves a huge challenge, and the strain on Mark and Penny becomes almost unbearable.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings

An expedition unearths a sealed tomb that has lain untouched for 4000 years, and discovers disturbing evidence of the lengths grave robbers will go to in search of treasure.(n)

programme.title: A Very British Hotel Chain: Inside Best Western
programme.desc: Documentary on the hotel company, which has 265 outlets across the United Kingdom, following its staff as they try to make a profit in the face of tough competition. programme.title: The Plane Crash
programme.desc: Scientists, pilots and aviation experts participate in a staged aeroplane crash in a remote area of Mexican desert, hoping the exercise will reveal more about what happens to aircraft and their occupants during forced emergency landings. Pilot James 'JimBob' Slocum will put a Boeing 727 passenger jet on a crash course, parachuting out minutes before impact - with former US Navy pilot Leland 'Chip' Shanle then taking charge of the craft via remote control from a chase plane. After the crash, experts will analyse the site, along with data collected from cameras, instruments and hi-tech crash test dummies, to learn more about what happens when planes are forced out of the sky.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays.(n)

programme.desc: This edition of the programme focuses on large families who depend on the benefits system, including 64-year-old Peter Rolfe, whose children - by 15 different women - range in ages from three to 43, of which he is the sole carer for six. He has been fighting his council in the Isle of Wight for a much bigger house and is also at loggerheads with the benefits office for capping his weekly payment. West Midlands mother-of-eight Marie Buchanan has recently split from her partner and is looking for a larger home, while Ipswich couple the Fisks have been in dispute with their neighbours, who objected to two houses being knocked into one to accommodate them and their 13 children.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: A famous rock star is acquitted of raping a fan after the victim's claims are rejected. Logan and Briscoe decide to investigate further, and discover the musician's pleasant reputation does not quite match his personality. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Logan face a race against time to catch a serial killer carrying out a series of racially motivated murders. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth.(n)

programme.desc: A wealthy man is found dead in his bed, and the team receive an anonymous tip that he was murdered. Logan and Briscoe encounter difficulties at the scene when the widow and her attorney refuse to allow an autopsy. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy is killed in a drive-by shooting, and investigatations lead Logan to a local gun dealer who is the suspect in another recent incident. However, things become complicated for Briscoe when the son of an old friend is also implicated in the crime.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is killed by a letter-bomb, and her scientist husband becomes the chief suspect when it is discovered that the couple were planning to divorce, but the victim was intentionally delaying the proceedings.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs is injured in an explosion while conducting inquiries aboard a ship. He lapses into a coma, during which he has flashbacks of the past he has always kept hidden. Meanwhile, Tony takes over the investigation, but his approach begins to cause friction.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A Ukrainian illegal immigrant working as a prostitute is murdered in a motel room, setting in motion an investigation that leads to a writer secretly profiling the singles scene. At first his guilt seems a foregone conclusion - but as inquiries continue, Falacci and Logan begin to suspect he is being framed. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. She believes her son is innocent and is merely trying to prove he is not guilty by forcing his 'victim' to go back on his lies. Starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A waitress is found raped and murdered outside a nightclub, with suspicion falling on her ex-boyfriend. However, the detectives get a new lead when they discover the victim was in an abusive love affair with her boss, while news of her treatment is mistakenly leaked to her father - who vows to take revenge on the attacker. Joe Morton (Law & Order) guest stars, alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is found murdered, and as detectives investigate the case, it is revealed she is involved in the same charitable foundation as four abduction victims. The scheme is run by a prominent physician who specialises in hormone replacement and perpetuating youth. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father who wants to avenge his daughter's murder, so Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Ruzek is surprised to be demoted to patrol.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Lindsay's disciplinary hearing is interrupted by a call from her distressed mother to say her boyfriend has been shot dead. However, when it turns out her parent knows more about the crime than was at first believed, Lindsay faces a huge dilemma.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

However, Stone and Kincaid work to prove the culprit had been brainwashed by Daniel Hendricks, the charismatic leader of a sinister religious cult. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan struggle with a heavy caseload, including four unrelated murders, a domestic quarrel, and an apparently motiveless killing that leaves them clueless.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star's father is murdered, and police suspect his death may be linked to a gambling addiction. After investigation, it turns out the star's alibi doesn't hold up and he ends up under suspicion himself.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.desc: The story of Diane Downs, the Arizona-born mother of three who in 1983 arrived at hospital, having murdered one of her children and left her remaining two critically injured.(n)

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of single mother-of-three Ruthie Lambert, who turned to drug trafficking to raise much-needed cash for her mortgage payments. She made numerous successful trips smuggling cocaine out of Peru, until she was finally caught and locked up in a tough South American prison. Ruth discovered she had incurable cancer, and fled the country in a desperate attempt to see her family.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bella Crane helps Jane and Frank O'Connor look for a holiday home in South Africa's Cape Town. programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the secrets to sticking to health resolutions made at New Year, with surgeon Gabriel Weston experimenting with a herbal supplement said to help people drink less alcohol. Dr Chris van Tulleken reveals unusual ways of getting a better night's sleep, and Michael Mosley discovers how to stay motivated. Meanwhile, Dr Saleyha Ahsan tests some revolutionary new science that could help people easily lose weight and be healthier.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Wild Coast. Property experts help British househunters find their dream properties abroad. (2009).(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets Lisa, who wants to swap her boring IT job for property development. Having bought a small three-bedroom house in Macclesfield, she sets about transforming it from a bland beige box to something that, thanks to her unique design ideas, will really stand out from the crowd. But are rose petal and leaf skeletons stuck to the wall really going to appeal to potential buyers?(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: An injured Ash is rushed to hospital, his confidence shattered - but an emergency forces him to return to duty. Final episode of the Second World war drama.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground.(n)

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home.(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: A Chinese woman who sells pirated films and stolen phones on the streets of Brixton, south London, has to repay her debts to a local gang, but when an immigration raid leaves her with no home, money or friends, she finds refuge with a barber - and an unlikely bond soon forms. The second of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Katie Leung, Gershwyn Eustache Jr, Benedict Wong and Lennie James.(n)

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: MMA & K1 from the Troxy in London title fight Mihai Zmarandescu vs Alfie Hawes plus Erol Raif vs George Zorilov, Kat Freeman vs Kat Twardowska.(n)

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Martha represents a mother accused of helping her paralysed teenage daughter to die - and with Clive taking on the prosecution, what begins as a highly contentious court case threatens to spill over into the barristers' personal lives and threaten their relationship. Meanwhile, the resignation of chambers head Alan provides an opportunity for one of the QCs to step up, and Billy's position becomes even more compromised when one of his actions is misinterpreted by a new member of staff. Legal drama, with guest appearances by Claire Skinner (Outnumbered) and Meera Syal (The Kumars).(n)

programme.desc: Jean-Luc Godard's drama-documentary following the Rolling Stones in the recording studio and exploring the development of the titular song, interspersed with fictional sequences exploring different sides of 1960s counter-culture, including black militants, graffiti artists and a mysterious woman pursued by a film-maker. programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: Horizon: The Secret World of Pain
programme.desc: The latest research into one of the most mysterious and common human experiences - pain. Breakthroughs have come from studying Jonathan Metz, who cut off his own arm to survive after it became lodged in a furnace, and three generations of an Italian family who do not feel extreme temperatures. There is a report on a new treatment that involves a pioneering computer game, and the impact of moods and emotions on a person's body is explored.(n)
